# Sub-Level 43.1

### **Description**

Students identify standard units, read simple measurements, and perform straightforward conversions with visual support.

## **Sections**

### **Section A**

Read a ruler (0–10 cm).

### **Section B**

Match object to unit.

Examples

✏️ → cm

🏃 Road → m

🍉 → kg

🥤 → mL

### **Section C**

Conversions

* 100 cm \= \_\_\_ m  
* 1000 g \= \_\_\_ kg  
* 1000 mL \= \_\_\_ L

### **Section D**

Simple comparison.

![][image1]
